task_completion.description: Open the crop_pest_scouting.gpkg project and access the scout_zones layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a GIS or database application open with the 'crop_pest_scouting.gpkg' file loaded and the 'scout_zones' layer visible in the interface.

task_completion.description: Open the attribute table or feature edit form for the scout_zones layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a table or form view displaying fields such as pest counts, scout_date, treatment_recommendation, action_notes, and recheck_date.

task_completion.description: Set treatment_recommendation to 'TREAT' for zones exceeding pest thresholds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'TREAT' entered into the treatment_recommendation field for a record where at least one pest count exceeds its threshold (e.g., soybean aphid >250, corn rootworm >5, etc.).

task_completion.description: Update action_notes with the exceeding pest and count, and set recheck_date to 7 days after scout_date for 'TREAT' zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the action_notes field containing the name of the exceeding pest and its count (e.g., 'soybean aphid 260') and the recheck_date field updated to a date exactly 7 days after the scout_date for that specific zone.

task_completion.description: Set treatment_recommendation to 'MONITOR' for zones where all pest counts are below thresholds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'MONITOR' entered into the treatment_recommendation field for a record where no pest counts exceed the specified thresholds.

task_completion.description: Save all edits to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the user clicking a 'Save', 'Apply', or checkmark button, or toggling off edit mode to commit the changes to the GeoPackage.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical user interface to edit the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with a visual GIS or database app (e.g., tapping fields, typing in forms). The agent should not be using a terminal to run raw SQL UPDATE queries or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually evaluated the thresholds rather than running an automated script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent viewing individual records or the table and manually inputting 'TREAT'/'MONITOR' and the corresponding notes/dates, rather than executing a batch update command.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GeoPackage file using an appropriate application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the presence of a genuine app interface (like a mobile GIS app or SQLite editor) modifying the .gpkg file, not a text editor modifying a CSV or text dump.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is a GeoPackage located at '/sdcard/crop_pest_scouting_result.gpkg' and the target layer is 'scout_zones'. The thresholds for 'TREAT' are: soybean aphid >250, corn rootworm beetles >5, European corn borer egg masses >10, bean leaf beetle >8, or defoliation >20. If any of these are exceeded, treatment_recommendation must be 'TREAT', action_notes must list the pest and count, and recheck_date must be exactly 7 days after scout_date. If none are exceeded, treatment_recommendation must be 'MONITOR'.
